description: Recommended-strategies dashboard — focuses attention on the 10 strategies worth following moving forward (R, S, U, N, A, B, C, E, I, O). Adds a 16-vote indicator heatmap so the regime landscape is visible at a glance. Built 2026-04-29.

panels.title: All 11 strategies — rebased to $10K at 04-29 open (v2 views) — session-compressed time
panels.description: Common-baseline comparison view. Each strategy's legacy equity curve rebased to $10K at the last 2026-04-28 mark-to-market. Backed by SQL views portfolio_state_<X>_v2 — pure derivation, no second writer, always in sync with the live v1 books. X-axis is SYNTHETIC trading time: each market session occupies a fixed 6.5h slot and abuts the next session — overnight gaps are zero-width. Real wall-clock dates not preserved on the axis; use the per-strategy panels below for real-time.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', ts) AS INTEGER) AS time, total_value AS "R" FROM portfolio_state_r_v2_session ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Latest Vote Snapshot — every indicator, every day (last 14 trading days)
panels.description: Rows = indicators (11 R votes + 5 S extras = 16). Columns = recent dates. Cell value: -1 (bear) / 0 (neutral) / +1 (bull). Cell-coloring thresholds: red ≤ -1, gray = 0, green ≥ +1. Apply 'Cell display mode = color background' on each numeric date column to render as a heatmap.

targets.rawSql: WITH recent AS (SELECT DISTINCT date FROM vote_history ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 14), pivoted AS (SELECT vh.vote_name AS indicator, vh.strategy_set AS scope, MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 0)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-0", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-1", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 2)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-2", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 3)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-3", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 4)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-4", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 5)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-5", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 6)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-6", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 7)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-7", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 8)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-8", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 9)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-9", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 10) THEN vh.value END) AS "d-10", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 11) THEN vh.value END) AS "d-11", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 12) THEN vh.value END) AS "d-12", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 13) THEN vh.value END) AS "d-13" FROM vote_history vh WHERE vh.date IN (SELECT date FROM recent) GROUP BY vh.vote_name, vh.strategy_set) SELECT scope, indicator, "d-0", "d-1", "d-2", "d-3", "d-4", "d-5", "d-6", "d-7", "d-8", "d-9", "d-10", "d-11", "d-12", "d-13" FROM pivoted ORDER BY scope, indicator
targets.rawQueryText: WITH recent AS (SELECT DISTINCT date FROM vote_history ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 14), pivoted AS (SELECT vh.vote_name AS indicator, vh.strategy_set AS scope, MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 0)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-0", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-1", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 2)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-2", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 3)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-3", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 4)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-4", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 5)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-5", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 6)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-6", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 7)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-7", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 8)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-8", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 9)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-9", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 10) THEN vh.value END) AS "d-10", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 11) THEN vh.value END) AS "d-11", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 12) THEN vh.value END) AS "d-12", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 13) THEN vh.value END) AS "d-13" FROM vote_history vh WHERE vh.date IN (SELECT date FROM recent) GROUP BY vh.vote_name, vh.strategy_set) SELECT scope, indicator, "d-0", "d-1", "d-2", "d-3", "d-4", "d-5", "d-6", "d-7", "d-8", "d-9", "d-10", "d-11", "d-12", "d-13" FROM pivoted ORDER BY scope, indicator
targets.queryText: WITH recent AS (SELECT DISTINCT date FROM vote_history ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 14), pivoted AS (SELECT vh.vote_name AS indicator, vh.strategy_set AS scope, MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 0)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-0", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-1", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 2)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-2", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 3)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-3", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 4)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-4", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 5)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-5", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 6)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-6", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 7)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-7", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 8)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-8", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 9)  THEN vh.value END) AS "d-9", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 10) THEN vh.value END) AS "d-10", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 11) THEN vh.value END) AS "d-11", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 12) THEN vh.value END) AS "d-12", MAX(CASE WHEN vh.date = (SELECT date FROM recent ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 13) THEN vh.value END) AS "d-13" FROM vote_history vh WHERE vh.date IN (SELECT date FROM recent) GROUP BY vh.vote_name, vh.strategy_set) SELECT scope, indicator, "d-0", "d-1", "d-2", "d-3", "d-4", "d-5", "d-6", "d-7", "d-8", "d-9", "d-10", "d-11", "d-12", "d-13" FROM pivoted ORDER BY scope, indicator

panels.title: Net Vote Score (sum of bull − bear) — R 11-vote vs S 16-vote
panels.description: At-a-glance regime tilt. Positive = bullish indicator landscape; negative = bearish.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date || ' 16:00:00') AS INTEGER) AS time, SUM(value) AS "R net (11)" FROM vote_history WHERE strategy_set = 'R' GROUP BY date ORDER BY date
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date || ' 16:00:00') AS INTEGER) AS time, SUM(value) AS "R net (11)" FROM vote_history WHERE strategy_set = 'R' GROUP BY date ORDER BY date
targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date || ' 16:00:00') AS INTEGER) AS time, SUM(value) AS "R net (11)" FROM vote_history WHERE strategy_set = 'R' GROUP BY date ORDER BY date

targets.rawSql: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date || ' 16:00:00') AS INTEGER) AS time, SUM(value) AS "S net (16)" FROM vote_history GROUP BY date ORDER BY date
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date || ' 16:00:00') AS INTEGER) AS time, SUM(value) AS "S net (16)" FROM vote_history GROUP BY date ORDER BY date
targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date || ' 16:00:00') AS INTEGER) AS time, SUM(value) AS "S net (16)" FROM vote_history GROUP BY date ORDER BY date

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'R' AS strategy, run_date, ts_utc, note FROM paper_r_runlog UNION ALL SELECT 'S', run_date, ts_utc, note FROM paper_s_runlog ORDER BY ts_utc DESC LIMIT 10
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT 'R' AS strategy, run_date, ts_utc, note FROM paper_r_runlog UNION ALL SELECT 'S', run_date, ts_utc, note FROM paper_s_runlog ORDER BY ts_utc DESC LIMIT 10
targets.queryText: SELECT 'R' AS strategy, run_date, ts_utc, note FROM paper_r_runlog UNION ALL SELECT 'S', run_date, ts_utc, note FROM paper_s_runlog ORDER BY ts_utc DESC LIMIT 10

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'R' AS strategy, ts, action, ticker, shares, price FROM trades_r UNION ALL SELECT 'S', ts, action, ticker, shares, price FROM trades_s UNION ALL SELECT 'U', ts, action, ticker, shares, price FROM trades_u UNION ALL SELECT 'N', ts, action, ticker, shares, price FROM trades_n ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 10
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT 'R' AS strategy, ts, action, ticker, shares, price FROM trades_r UNION ALL SELECT 'S', ts, action, ticker, shares, price FROM trades_s UNION ALL SELECT 'U', ts, action, ticker, shares, price FROM trades_u UNION ALL SELECT 'N', ts, action, ticker, shares, price FROM trades_n ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 10
targets.queryText: SELECT 'R' AS strategy, ts, action, ticker, shares, price FROM trades_r UNION ALL SELECT 'S', ts, action, ticker, shares, price FROM trades_s UNION ALL SELECT 'U', ts, action, ticker, shares, price FROM trades_u UNION ALL SELECT 'N', ts, action, ticker, shares, price FROM trades_n ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: 📈 Factor Attribution (α / β to QQQ / SPY / TQQQ / VIX / TNX / HYG)
Factor decomposition — refreshed daily by stocks.service
panels.description: OLS factor attribution from src.analysis.factor_attribution. α %/yr is the annualized intercept (positive = strategy adds value beyond what the factors explain). β columns are per-factor regression coefficients. R² close to 1 = factors fully explain the strategy's returns; close to 0 = the strategy does something the factors don't capture. Caveat: at n<60 daily obs, OLS betas are unstable — interpret directionally, not literally.

targets.rawSql: SELECT strategy_id AS "Strat", ROUND(alpha_pct, 2) AS "α %/yr", ROUND(beta_qqq, 3)  AS "β QQQ", ROUND(beta_spy, 3)  AS "β SPY", ROUND(beta_tqqq, 3) AS "β TQQQ", ROUND(beta_vix, 4)  AS "β VIX", ROUND(beta_tnx, 4)  AS "β TNX", ROUND(beta_hyg, 3)  AS "β HYG", ROUND(r_squared, 3) AS "R²", ROUND(residual_vol_pct, 2) AS "Resid σ %/yr", n_observations AS "n", note AS "note" FROM factor_attribution_cache WHERE strategy_id IN ('R','S','U','N','A','B','C','E','I','O') ORDER BY CASE strategy_id   WHEN 'R' THEN 1 WHEN 'S' THEN 2 WHEN 'U' THEN 3 WHEN 'N' THEN 4   WHEN 'A' THEN 5 WHEN 'B' THEN 6 WHEN 'C' THEN 7   WHEN 'E' THEN 8 WHEN 'I' THEN 9 WHEN 'O' THEN 10 END
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strategy_id AS "Strat", ROUND(alpha_pct, 2) AS "α %/yr", ROUND(beta_qqq, 3)  AS "β QQQ", ROUND(beta_spy, 3)  AS "β SPY", ROUND(beta_tqqq, 3) AS "β TQQQ", ROUND(beta_vix, 4)  AS "β VIX", ROUND(beta_tnx, 4)  AS "β TNX", ROUND(beta_hyg, 3)  AS "β HYG", ROUND(r_squared, 3) AS "R²", ROUND(residual_vol_pct, 2) AS "Resid σ %/yr", n_observations AS "n", note AS "note" FROM factor_attribution_cache WHERE strategy_id IN ('R','S','U','N','A','B','C','E','I','O') ORDER BY CASE strategy_id   WHEN 'R' THEN 1 WHEN 'S' THEN 2 WHEN 'U' THEN 3 WHEN 'N' THEN 4   WHEN 'A' THEN 5 WHEN 'B' THEN 6 WHEN 'C' THEN 7   WHEN 'E' THEN 8 WHEN 'I' THEN 9 WHEN 'O' THEN 10 END
targets.queryText: SELECT strategy_id AS "Strat", ROUND(alpha_pct, 2) AS "α %/yr", ROUND(beta_qqq, 3)  AS "β QQQ", ROUND(beta_spy, 3)  AS "β SPY", ROUND(beta_tqqq, 3) AS "β TQQQ", ROUND(beta_vix, 4)  AS "β VIX", ROUND(beta_tnx, 4)  AS "β TNX", ROUND(beta_hyg, 3)  AS "β HYG", ROUND(r_squared, 3) AS "R²", ROUND(residual_vol_pct, 2) AS "Resid σ %/yr", n_observations AS "n", note AS "note" FROM factor_attribution_cache WHERE strategy_id IN ('R','S','U','N','A','B','C','E','I','O') ORDER BY CASE strategy_id   WHEN 'R' THEN 1 WHEN 'S' THEN 2 WHEN 'U' THEN 3 WHEN 'N' THEN 4   WHEN 'A' THEN 5 WHEN 'B' THEN 6 WHEN 'C' THEN 7   WHEN 'E' THEN 8 WHEN 'I' THEN 9 WHEN 'O' THEN 10 END

title: Strategies v2 — Recommended Set + Common Baseline + Heatmap
